channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-05-17 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [05/17] Bazaar Bazaar: All Of Your Favorite Things @ Spirit
item.description:
Two-floor curated bazaar at Spirit featuring vintage, art, and more.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/17] Siesta Fiesta @ Navushouse
item.description:
A Latin &amp; global music party with DJs, drag, art, tattoos, food, and reiki celebrating two years and AAPI Heritage Month.

Venue: Navushouse

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/17] Beats and Improv @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:
A fun night of original music, beats, DJing, and improvisation at Bantha Tea Bar in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/17] Jaboukie Young-White @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Jaboukie Young-White live at Bottlerocket.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/17] An Evening with VNV Nation @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
VNV Nation live at Mr. Smalls Theatre with extended set, Q&amp;A, and autograph session.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/17] Lonely No More w/ Kinseland @ Apteka
item.description:
Lonely No More Sunday night series at Apteka featuring Kinseland

Venue: Apteka

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/19] Halloween (PHL) with Silver Car Crash and Velvet Overkill @ The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Halloween (PHL) plays The Funhouse with Silver Car Crash and Velvet Overkill.

Venue: The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/20] Frank Lloyd Wrong / Cherry Drop Cullossus / Monsters of the Week / Mogwo @ Green Beacon Gallery
item.description:
A multi-band rock night at Green Beacon Gallery in Greensburg featuring Detroit's Cherry Drop Cullossus alongside local acts.

Venue: Green Beacon Gallery

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/20] Oranssi Pazuzu with Wayfarer @ Westside Bowl
item.description:
Finnish psychedelic black metal band Oranssi Pazuzu with Wayfarer at Westside Bowl.

Venue: Westside Bowl

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/20] Sweet Abyss w/ Yessi, JZKL, I4A + @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:
A night of transgender dance music featuring live performances and DJs at Bantha Tea Bar.

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/20] Viogression with Diabolic Oath, O.I.L @ Brillobox
item.description:
Cult Midwest death metal veterans Viogression live at Brillobox with Diabolic Oath, O.I.L

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Sisters / Belovar / The Long Hunt @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
A heavy rock triple bill featuring Sisters (members of Spotlights &amp; Molly McGuire), Belovar (members of Errortype:11 &amp; Orange 9mm), and The Long Hunt at Poetry Lounge in Millvale.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Jazz Poetry 2026: Poet-Vocalist Erika Denae J’s “In the Mood For” (Book Launch & Album Teaser) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
The third concert in the highly-acclaimed Jazz Poetry Series for 2026 features Erika Denae J who debuts her poetry.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Public Acid with Ultimatum, The Kron @ West Penn Recreation Center
item.description:
Public Acid and Act Up perform live at West Penn Skate Park on May 21.

Venue: West Penn Recreation Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Between The Buried And Me: The Blue Nowhere US Tour @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Between The Buried And Me brings their Spring 2026 US Tour to Pittsburgh with special guests Imperial Triumphant and The World Is A Beautiful Place &amp; I Am No Longer Afraid To Die.

Venue: Roxian Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Brewery Sessions: Yessi & PVKVSV @ Jackworth Ginger Beer
item.description:
A free live music event featuring Yessi and PVKVSV at Jackworth Ginger Beer in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Jackworth Ginger Beer

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Pennsylvania Film Night @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:
A night of screenings by Pennsylvania film-makers and artists

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Tough Pill #58 @ The Government Center
item.description:
Tough Pill #58 brings four acts to Government Center in Pittsburgh for a night of live improved music.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/21] Misophonia w/ Decide Today, Funeral Parade of Roses, Lilac Web, Blood Noize, Cutups @ Club Pittsburgh
item.description:
A night of anarcho-electronics, techno-punk, digital hardcore, breakcore and industrial sounds at Club Pittsburgh

Venue: Club Pittsburgh

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/22] Harsh Noise in the Smut Room @ Fungus Books
item.description:
Fungus Books presents an adults-only harsh noise event featuring Celebrity Sex and Bestiality Network.

Venue: Fungus Books

item.title: [05/22] World Goth Day Party 2026 @ The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Night Sky Productions presents the World Goth Day Party 2026 featuring live acts, DJs, vendors, fashion, art, and a listening party at The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls.

Venue: The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/22] 40th 10 Minute Playfest @ Glitterbox Theater
item.description:
Glitterbox Theater's 40th annual 10 Minute Playfest featuring an evening of short plays over two nights in Homestead, PA.

Venue: Glitterbox Theater

item.description:
